{{Extend "layout"}} {{Block "title"}}{{$.Stored.title}} - {{"镜像管理"|$.T}}{{/Block}} {{Block "breadcrumb"}} {{Super}}
  • {{"镜像管理"|$.T}}
  • {{$.Stored.title}}
    • {{/Block}} {{Block "main"}}

    {{`镜像信息`|$.T}}

    {{$detail := $.Stored.detail}} {{- if $detail.Container -}} {{$.Fetch "docker/base/image/detail/config" $detail.ContainerConfig}} {{- end -}} {{$.Fetch "docker/base/image/detail/config" $detail.Config}} {{$.Fetch "docker/base/image/detail/graph_driver" $detail.GraphDriver}}
    ID {{$detail.ID}}
    Tags {{range $kk,$vv:=$detail.RepoTags}}{{if gt $kk 0}} / {{end}}{{$vv}}{{end}}
    Digests {{range $kk,$vv:=$detail.RepoDigests}}{{if gt $kk 0}} / {{end}}{{$vv}}{{end}}
    Parent {{$detail.Parent}} Comment {{$detail.Comment}}
    Created {{$detail.Created}} Container {{$detail.Container}}
    DockerVersion {{$detail.DockerVersion}} Author {{$detail.Author}}
    Architecture {{$detail.Architecture}} Os {{$detail.Os}}
    Size {{$detail.Size|FormatBytes}} VirtualSize {{$detail.VirtualSize|FormatBytes}}
    ContainerConfig
    Config
    GraphDriver
    RootFS
    Type {{$detail.RootFS.Type}} Layers {{range $kk,$vv:=$detail.RootFS.Layers}} {{$kk}}. {{$vv}}
    {{end}}
    Metadata
    LastTagTime {{$detail.Metadata.LastTagTime}}

    {{`Image layers`|$.T}}

    {{- range $k,$v:= $.Stored.historyList -}} {{- end -}}
    # {{`创建内容`|$.T}} {{`创建时间`|$.T}} {{`尺寸`|$.T}}
    {{$k}} {{$v.CreatedBy}} {{(Date $v.Created).Format `2006-01-02 15:04:05`}} {{FormatBytes $v.Size}}
    {{/Block}} {{Block "footer"}} {{/Block}}
